productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Kane Red & White Kidswear
description: Composition top: Red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with white ribbed crew neck, white panel running from collar to sleeve hem and with graphic on the chest shorts: White shorts made of cotton, with two cargo pockets on the front Fit Top: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months) Shorts: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months) Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge the bossy side side of your little boy in this red tee and white shorts combo from gini and jony. The "Dad I'm in charge" lettering and the small elephant graphic on the chest all add to the cute bossy spirit of the tee. Team this with the super comfy shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
